response: Wilmington International Airport is closer to the Atlantic Ocean than Texarkana Regional Airport. Wilmington International Airport is located just north of Wilmington, North Carolina, and is five miles (8 km) south of Wilmington, which is approximately 30 miles (50 km) from Philadelphia. Texarkana Regional Airport is located three nautical miles (6 km) northeast of Texarkana, Arkansas, and is further from the Atlantic Ocean.
